items.caption: Two green product packaging designs feature Chinese text, showcasing branding and product information with a close-up of the front and a side view.

A product packaging for "da vinci professional brush soap." the packaging is predominantly white with black text and a black and white photograph of the soap bar. the soap bar is placed to the left of the packaging, and the packaging is open, revealing the product inside. the text on the packaging provides information about the product, including its brand, type, and quantity. the packaging also includes a barcode and a product number. the background of the image is plain and does not distract from the product.
scissors are needed to open the packaging on an apple product.
